summary.lv: AS "RĪGAS SILTUMS" Digitālo risinājumu departaments meklē datu bāzu administratoru, kas izstrādās un uzturēs Oracle datu bāzu arhitektūru (PL/SQL, RMAN, ORDS), veidos automatizāciju ar Bash/Python un CI/CD pipelines ar Jenkins.
summary.en: RĪGAS SILTUMS' Digital Solutions department is hiring a database administrator to develop and maintain Oracle database architecture (PL/SQL, RMAN, ORDS), build automation with Bash/Python and CI/CD pipelines with Jenkins.
